REPORT.TITLE: Checkout report, select row if you want to report condition to staff

SAAS.LOCKER_CHECKIN_MANY_INSTRUCTIONS_FINAL: Thank you. Please wait while we finalize your return session

HOLD.LOCKER_WELCOME_NEW_USER_INSTRUCTIONS: Welcome {{patron}} to the Hold picup locker. If locker has space, please select your preference door hight or Accessable ADA locker
HOLD.HOLD_INSTRUCTIONS: Welcome {{patron}} to the Hold pickup locker. Please collect your hold items from following lockers

LOT.GUIDE: To start, scan your library card or select an item
LOT.LOCKER_WELCOME_NEW_USER_INSTRUCTIONS: Welcome to the Library of Things.
LOT.RETURN_INSTRUCTIONS_TO_USER: To return an item, {{patronId}} do scan it or return it to the library staff at the front desk
LOT.RETURN_INSTRUCTIONS: To return an item, scan it or return it to the library staff at the front desk
LOT.RETURN_INSTRUCTIONS_NOITEMS: No things to return into this locker
LOT.RETURN_INSTRUCTIONS_ONE: Please return your checked out thing to opened locker
LOT.RETURN_INSTRUCTIONS_MANY: You have {{count}} things checked out, click thing or scan its barcode to return. Finalize by closing all doors
LOT.LOGIN_AND_CHECKOUT_INFO:
Scan your library card or enter your patron ID to authenticate.
Once verified, you will proceed with the {{groupName}} checkout — or place a hold if no items are currently available.
LOT.LOGIN_AND_CHECKOUT_INFO_PASSWORD:
Scan your library card, or enter your patron ID and password to authenticate.
Once verified, you will proceed with the {{groupName}} checkout — or place a hold if no items are currently available.
LOT.LOGIN_TO_CHECKOUT_INFO:
Scan your library card or enter your patron ID to authenticate.
Once verified, you may check out a selected item or place a hold if it is not currently available.
LOT.LOGIN_TO_CHECKOUT_INFO_PASSWORD:
Scan your library card, or enter your patron ID and password to authenticate.
Once verified, you may check out a selected item or place a hold if it is not currently available.

Place {{itemCount}} with ID {{itemId}} into locker #{{doorNumber}}.
